description: Hillbilly Software appears to provide the Shinobi API, a media/entertainment data service with endpoints covering movies, television, cast and crew, aliases, and awards. Public developer pages on the main domain were not accessible during verification, so the mapping is based on the curated published API specification record.
summary: hillbillysoftware.com exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the Shinobi API at `https://api.hillbillysoftware.com`, with authentication indicated by an access token passed as a path parameter in the published Swagger/OpenAPI-derived catalog record.
